tree.name: Jusuf Nurkic
tree.tradeDescription: UTA traded Collin Sexton to Charlotte for Jusuf Nurkic. Utah also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Collin Sexton
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: UTA traded Donovan Mitchell to CLE for Lauri Markkanen, Collin Sexton, Ochai Agbaji, 2025 1st (CLE), 2026 1st swap, 2027 1st (CLE), 2028 1st swap, 2029 1st (CLE).
assetsGivenUp.note: Alabama guard, explosive scorer from Cleveland
